name: Pulse
description: Pulse is a planned mobile app that connects blood donors with hospitals in real-time, enabling fast matching by blood type, location, and urgency. The current web version is a working prototype; the mobile app is the next implementation step, focused on reliability and accessibility for users on low-bandwidth connections.
features: Mobile-first donor matching by blood type and proximity
Push notifications for urgent hospital requests
SMS/email fallbacks for offline donors
Donor history & eligibility tracking
Web prototype available — mobile implementation planned

name: Luxe Boutique
tagline: Premium e-commerce platform with real-time seller dashboard.
description: Luxe Boutique is a premium e-commerce platform with separate customer and seller experiences, real-time notifications, and a mobile-first responsive design.
features: Customer portal — browse products, manage cart, track orders
Seller dashboard — manage products, orders, and notifications
Real-time updates via WebSocket-based notification system
Mobile-first responsive design with a polished UI

name: Gender Voice Predictor
tagline: Predicts gender from voice recordings using ML.
description: A full-stack machine learning application that predicts gender from voice recordings using audio feature extraction and classification. The system consists of a React-based frontend and a FastAPI backend with a trained machine learning model.
features: Audio feature extraction from raw voice recordings
Trained on 16,000+ voice samples
FastAPI inference endpoint with React frontend
Currently ~70% accuracy — exploring Microsoft pretrained models for improvements

name: Paccy Unigate
tagline: Scholarships, jobs, and career resources for Rwanda — in one place.
description: A platform that helps students and graduates discover scholarships, job opportunities, and career resources in Rwanda, all in one place.
features: Curated scholarship listings with deadlines and eligibility
Job and internship board tailored to the Rwandan market
Career resources hub (CV tips, interview prep, guides)
Search and filtering across opportunities

name: Portfolio.dev
tagline: This site — an IDE-style interactive portfolio.
description: An IDE-themed portfolio with a fully functional terminal, autocomplete, and command-driven navigation. Designed to feel like a real developer environment rather than a generic template.
features: Command registry pattern — add a new command in one file
Real-time autocomplete with Tab cycling
Data-driven projects & skills
Mobile fallback for unsupported viewports
